message:
feat: add refresh rate limiting + tests for robot accounts refresh

wa-nu4.1.5.5: Complete the robot accounts refresh command with:

Rate limiting:
- check_refresh_cooldown() helper: checks if cooldown window has elapsed
- 30s cooldown (ROBOT_REFRESH_COOLDOWN_MS) prevents spamming caut
- Returns error_code "robot.rate_limited" with wait-time hint
- Gracefully degrades if DB is unavailable (allows refresh)

Tests (10 new, 58 total wa tests):
- Cooldown logic: allows after expiry, blocks within window, boundary checks,
  handles zero/negative timestamps, constant value validation
- DB mirror round-trip: CautRefresh fixture → from_caut → upsert → verify
  DB state matches, idempotent re-refresh doesn't duplicate records
- DB mirror update: refresh with changed usage data updates existing record

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
